rationale: The cited paper appears as a single supporting reference in the discussion section, where the authors note that customer engagement can be a source of competitive advantage. It is used to back a general implication rather than to build the core conceptual model, hypotheses, measures, or empirical strategy of the app-announcement event study. The citing paper does not rely on Kumar and Pansari (2016) in a distinct, central way beyond this broad contextual claim.
